```python
import pandas as pd

# Load the data into a DataFrame

# Calculate profit relative to rent (revenue - rent)
df['profit'] = df['monthly_revenue'] - df['rent']

# Find the vendor with the least profit relative to rent
least_profitable_vendor = df.loc[df['profit'].idxmin()]

# Output the type of the vendor with the least profit relative to rent
vendor_type = least_profitable_vendor['type']
print(f"The vendor that makes the least money relative to the rent it pays is of type: {vendor_type}")
```
